expected.notes: Foreign-owned SMLLC triggers filing requirement regardless of revenue; owner_residency is nonresident_alien (neq us_citizen_or_pr) and entity_type is smllc.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'no_revenue_still_must_file'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - answers.entity_type eq smllc
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
